name: Australian Solomons Gold Ltd
description: Australian Solomons Gold Ltd was a mineral exploration and development company primarily focused on the acquisition and development of gold projects in the Solomon Islands. The company's flagship asset was the Gold Ridge project, where it conducted extensive drilling and exploration programs to evaluate the potential for open-pit mining operations. Although it was listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX: SGA), the company was headquartered in Albion, Queensland, Australia. The firm aimed to leverage its geological expertise to identify and advance high-potential mineral deposits within the region before eventually undergoing corporate restructuring and name changes.
